# AUTO INSURANCE — Hellcat Insurance / Contractors Choice Agency
# https://hellcatinsurance.com
# llms.txt v1.0

## Site Name
Hellcat Insurance (powered by Contractors Choice Agency)

## Description
Fast online auto insurance quotes for personal vehicles, commercial fleets, contractor work trucks, and specialty vehicles. All 50 states. No phone trees. Quotes in 15 minutes.

## Primary URL
https://hellcatinsurance.com

## Parent Organization
Contractors Choice Agency
12220 E Riggs Road Suite #105, Chandler, AZ 85249
Phone: 844-967-5247
Email: josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
Licensed in all 50 states | NPN: 8608479

## Main Services
- Personal Auto Insurance
- Commercial Auto Insurance (business vehicles, fleets, contractor trucks)
- Liability Only Coverage (state minimum)
- Full Coverage Auto Insurance (comprehensive + collision)
- Commercial auto for contractors and trades (roofers, HVAC, spray foam, general contractors)

## Key Pages
- /quote.html — Get an instant auto insurance quote (main entry point)
- /404.html — 404 error page

## Target Audience
Contractors, tradespeople, and everyday drivers seeking fast, honest auto insurance quotes. Specialty focus on commercial vehicles used in contracting and construction trades.

## Coverage
Nationwide — all 50 United States
